CPU 每分钟平均使用率，已做归一化处理，即不管几个核，CPU使用率最大值为 1: Average CPU usage per minute, normalized so that the maximum CPU usage is 100% regardless of the number of cores
JVM CPU 每分钟平均使用率: JVM Average CPU Usage per Minute
JVM 进程在最近系统采样周期内（通常是几百毫秒） CPU 的使用率\nhttp:
CPU usage of the JVM process during the most recent system sampling period (usually a few hundred milliseconds)
https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/runtime/jvm-metrics/
上次GC后 JVM Memory Used(heap): JVM Memory Used After Last GC (heap)
上次GC后 JVM Memory Used(nonheap): JVM Memory Used After Last GC (nonheap)
最近一次GC后的内存使用量: Memory Used After the Last GC
过去1分钟单次GC耗时95分位值（秒）: P95 Single GC Duration in the Last Minute (Seconds)
过去一分钟GC总耗时（秒）: Total GC Duration in the Last Minute (Seconds)
过去一分钟GC次数: GC Count in the Last Minute
过去一分钟GC耗时（秒）: GC Duration in the Last Minute (Seconds)
过去一分钟每次GC平均耗时（秒）: Average GC Duration in the Last Minute (Seconds)
